rationale: Section 25.193 references Section 11.13 generally for notice triggers but specifies no dollar amounts. Increasing the exemption from $140,000 to $200,000 does not alter the notice mechanism, which depends on cancellation or reduction of an approved exemption, not the exemption's value.
quote: if the property is a single-family residence that qualifies for an exemption under Section 11.13
_note: No conflict. §25.193 operates by cross-reference to §11.13 without embedding dollar thresholds, so the proposed increase requires no amendment to this section.
